name: list
invariants: output.ok === false || output.spectacles.every(s => typeof s.watching === 'number' && s.watching >= 0)
output.ok === false || output.spectacles.every(s => typeof s.openMarketCount === 'number' && s.openMarketCount >= 0)
_note: Live world spectacles — merges in-memory watcher counts (spectator-mode) with open SPARKS markets (betting-markets). Pure read; honest-empty (live:false everywhere) when nothing is running.
